response.justification: Maria Rodriguez has extensive experience in software engineering, cloud infrastructure, and multi-language development, with recent work in AI-agent infrastructure (MCP) and TypeScript. However, her resume lacks explicit mentions of GenAI, vector databases, RAG architectures, or multi-agent systems—core requirements for this role. Her AI-related contributions are limited to MCP frameworks, and she does not highlight LLM performance metrics, optimization, or cloud-native AI system design.
strengths: Strong full-stack engineering background with TypeScript and cloud platforms (AWS CDK, Node.js)
Recent experience contributing to AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling (MCP code generators)
Proven ability to lead technical projects, mentor teams, and implement CI/CD pipelines across diverse stacks
concerns: No explicit experience with GenAI, vector databases, or RAG architectures—critical for this role
Limited mention of LLM performance metrics, optimization, or multi-agent system frameworks (e.g., LangGraph, CrewAI)
Resume does not emphasize customer-facing technical leadership or stakeholder discovery sessions

key_factors.factor: Cloud-native AI system design and deployment
Multi-agent system frameworks and LLM optimization
